channel.title: Secure on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in Secure on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Secure Coding Practices
item.description: Introduction Secure coding is the practice of writing code that is resistant to attack. It is a critical part of any security program, as it can help to prevent attackers from exploiting vulnerabilities in your code. There are many different secure coding practices that you can implement. Some of the most important ones include: Input validation: This is the process of checking user input for malicious content. It is important to validate all user input, including input from forms, cookies, and headers.
